scope: Add IntegratedDisplayPanicRecord as first-class integrated scenario evidence
Tie target_abi PanicRingV1 extraction to G11 DisplayPanicLastFrame evidence and a substrate panic event
Require exact kind/id/generation for display-panic-last-frame references and event-visible substrate panic attribution
Require panic ring bounds: 64 KiB ring, 4 KiB max record, no corrupt records, no truncated records, and bounded contract panic summary
Require raw_framebuffer_bytes_exported=false and panic_path_allocates=false so X8 cannot be mistaken for raw display dump or real substrate halt
Emit SubstratePanic and IntegratedDisplayPanicRecorded events with stable osctl ViewV1 JSON
Expose historical graph edges without creating live ownership or substrate mapping truth
Publish target_executor semantic package roots and count validation for X8 evidence

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: X8 panic ring extraction after substrate panic
panic ring evidence is JSONL-visible, bounded, and target-to-host only
integrated display panic references carry kind/id/generation
integrated scenario uses Historical graph edges for panic event and display last-frame attribution
osctl exposes stable ViewV1 JSON and contract validation output

findings_fixed: contract graph models IntegratedDisplayPanic as exact-generation integrated evidence
target_executor writes X8 records, roots, and counts into the semantic package
osctl command, inspect, replay, and graph history expose integrated-display-panic evidence through stable ViewV1 JSON
semantic validation rejects missing substrate panic events, corrupt/truncated panic ring evidence, and display last-frame drift
target_abi panic-ring extraction is used as evidence without making raw panic ring internals semantic truth
bad_smells_checked: No raw framebuffer bytes are exported
No real substrate halt is claimed
No target-side cwasm execution path was changed
No adapter internal structs are serialized as osctl stable views
No third-party dependency was introduced in semantic_core
residual_notes: X9 owns full osctl trace replay
Future real substrate panic handling must feed the same semantic SubstratePanic and IntegratedDisplayPanic evidence rather than bypassing X8

validation_commands.command: cargo check -p semantic_core -p artifact_manifest -p contract_core -p target_executor -p osctl

residual_gaps: X9 owns full osctl trace replay
Real substrate panic handling must later provide runtime-backed evidence through the existing semantic objects
